evidence: Enjoyed this series. It presented a view of another part of the medical field I knew little about and presented it in very interesting story's.
We thoroughly enjoyed watching Angie Harmon in 'The Women's Murder Club' series adapted from James Patterson's books.
I've enjoyed the Killing, a very suspenceful story with a number of twists and turns.
The stories intertwine between corporate law issues and then there are people oriented issues dealing with child advadacy.
Enjoyed this series. We hope it will be renewed for a 7th season.
Good movie overall, but they could have restrained the use of the F--- word, and still have an excellent movie.
I especially enjoyed that the use of the F..... bomb was in very limited use.
It's sad that the series did not get picked up for continuation.
We also enjoy reading the books by Tess Gerritsen, whose novels this series is loosely based.
The characters are enjoyable watch and the story lines are usually quite interesting.
I hope the public likes this series, so that another season and Bosch story can be told.
It's sad that the series did not get picked up for continuation.
I really enjoy this series. The characters are enjoyable watch and the story lines are usually quite interesting.

summary: The user enjoys drama and thriller genres, particularly those with complex narratives and engaging characters. They show a strong loyalty to specific creators and appreciate emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
